'''Tetan Royal Ships''' were used by [[Tetan/Legends|Tetan]] royalty for transportation through space c. [[4000 BBY/Legends|4000 BBY]].

==History==
[[Lord/Legends|Lord]] [[Keto]] and his sister, [[Magda Keto]], traveled on-board a Royal Ship when they made their fateful visit to a [[Tetan carbonite smelter]] in [[3997 BBY]].

==Appearances==
*[[Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith 1|''Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith'' 1]]
